feed.title: SAP Community - SAP NetWeaver
feed.subtitle: SAP NetWeaver Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to check SAP readiness check in SAP PI NW 7.5 java stack system
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Can you please help finding the procedure to run the SAP readiness check for NW 7.5 PI java system?

Best Regards

M. Jayaraman


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: F5 external loadbalancer connection to SAPRouter and SAP Web dispatcher
entry.content:
Hello,

We'd to know if F5 load balancer solution is supported in SAP connection to SAP Web Dispatcher and SAProuter.

Could you kindly give any information about this?

Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Business Address Services (BAS)
entry.content:
Hello- We're using Business Address Services to send the PDF copy to our customers. Standard Program 'RSCONN01' is being executed via Batch job through SCOT. I am still unable to figure out how SAP reads the Address from the SOPR table links with the Personal number and triggers an email. Keep in mind that there's no contact person maintained in the customer master data and I believe the Personal numbers were created using SADP using SODI PERS Group.

I can track everything from SOST/SOOD tables but am unable to figure out how program RSCONN01 picks up the personal number's email. 

 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: how to get spool file from SAP (not using SM37)
entry.content:
hi,


we would some requirement from business to download job spool and upload to sharepoint.


in SAP there are tables under SP00 and able to find the spool name, spool id, etc.


is there any program /transaction we can use to search/fetch the spool?


e.g. from end user point of view, I go SM37, search the job name, open the spool, and save


can we get the spool from program or back end by spool name or id? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to convert the http URL to https secure protocol?
entry.content:
How to convert the http URL to https secure protocol in SAP PI/PO system.

entry.title: According to note 1770532 we would like to confirm some information
entry.content:
Hi SAP
I would like to know the calculation of standard system HugePages for an Oracle database. As a reference, we checked SAP Note DIGITS, but it is not clear about No.2 (ABAP central system - SAP ABAP Central Instance (CI) or Primary Application Server (PAS) and Oracle database on the same host). Please provide more detailed information

 

Best Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: No RFC authorization for function module RFCPING.
entry.content:
Hi!

I need to know how to resolve the error that displays the RFCPING authorization error message?

2024-11-02 08:24:14,052 ERROR HOMOLOGACAO - 3.133.1 [main] [JCoServerDeployment.java:122] erro ao iniciar o SAP server
com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: Server default repository destination CLIENT_POOL is invalid: Initialization of repository destination CLIENT_POOL failed: No RFC authorization for function module RFCPING. on 10.xx.xx.xx sysnr 00
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.DefaultServer.update(DefaultServer.java:240)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.DefaultServer.<init>(DefaultServer.java:117)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.DefaultServerManager$DefaultServerFactory.createServer(DefaultServerManager.java:412)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.DefaultServerManager.getServer(DefaultServerManager.java:104)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.StandaloneServerFactory.update(StandaloneServerFactory.java:362)
at com.sap.conn.jco.rt.StandaloneServerFactory.getServerInstance(StandaloneServerFactory.java:175)
at com.sap.conn.jco.server.JCoServerFactory.getServer(JCoServerFactory.java:105)
at com.mastersaf.dfe.connectores.JCoServerDeployment.createJCoServer(JCoServerDeployment.java:118)
at com.mastersaf.dfe.connectores.JCoServerDeployment.createAndConfigureJCoServer(JCoServerDeployment.java:80)
at com.mastersaf.dfe.connectores.JCoServerDeployment.createRFCServer(JCoServerDeployment.java:66)
at com.mastersaf.dfe.connectores.JCoServerDeployment.onDeploy(JCoServerDeployment.java:62)
at com.mastersaf.integrator.core.IntegratorServer.runAllDeploymentListeners(IntegratorServer.java:64)
at com.mastersaf.integrator.core.IntegratorServer.start(IntegratorServer.java:58)
at com.mastersaf.integrator.core.IntegratorServer.main(IntegratorServer.java:41)
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke0(Native Method)
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.NativeMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(NativeMethodAccessorImpl.java:77)
at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.java:43)

entry.title: Query Regarding sapgui scripting parameters
entry.content:
There is a recommendation to set below to parameters with the value - 

sapgui/user_scripting_disable_recording = TRUE
sapgui/user_scripting_set_readonly = TRUE

But we need to keep sapgui scripting recording enabled and even we cannot make the scripting 'read only' also. In that case, is there any workaround (like restricting the use for certain users or any other dependent paraneters etc) where even if we keep the values as 'TRUE' for both parameters but still recording will work and it shall not be 'read-only'? 

 

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP HIgh memory usage
entry.content:
Hi PERSON_NAME,
We have been observing high memory usage on SAP PERSON_NAME production system since yesterday.
Pool/PersistenceManager/PersistentSpace/DefaultLPA/LOBPage is around 66 GB now and it is increasing every hour.
 
Our current PERSON_NAME version is '2.00.059.PHONE_NUMBER'
Attaching output of "HANA_Memory_TopConsumers_TimeSlices_2.00.043+", "HANA_LOBs_DiskLOBs_2.00.040+.txt".
 

Please let us know how to stop the growing memory and bring down high memory usage on PERSON_NAME.
 Let us know what is causing the growth of LOB pages?

Thanks,
Chaitanya

Question and Answer:
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Installation

Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: PERSON_NAME Software

Q: SAP PERSON_NAME Revision number and Operating System where software is being installed
A:

Q: Software being upgraded (source and target)?
A...(truncated)
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to install NetWeaver 7.5 on AWS
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Regarding installation of NetWeaver on AWS, is there any way to install it without using "AWS Launch Wizard for SAP"?  If there is, it would be very helpful if you could guide me on how to do.

Thanks and Regards,
Takuya Nezu

entry.title: setup windows cluster for SAP HA
entry.content:
I have problem when setting Windows cluster before installation SAP Netware 7.52. please help.

Could you please share cluster requirements/reparation for installing sap HA?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Upgrade : SAPKB70208
entry.content:
Hello

We use Rev-Trac to import transports between our different systems. Rev-Trac, with its OOPS tool, allows us to check the consistency of data and objects. We recently encountered a problem with OOPS, which was due to a difference in package support levels.


In our ECC System, we have: 4 systems for DEV, QUAL, PreProd and Un prod.
D10, Q10, U10 and P10
In 2011: the two systems U10 and P10 have been upgraded from SAPKB70207 (Basis Support Package 07 for 7.02 Imported on 14.06.2011 )
  to SAPKB70208 and then to 
SAPKB73101 (SAP_BASIS 731: SP 0001 Imported on 16.10.2012 )
the two Dev and Quality systems did not upgrade to SAPKB70208, they have been upgraded directly from SAPKB70207 to SAPKB73101 without going through SAPKB70208 .

Can SAPKB70208 be upgraded?

entry.title: GUI F4 help amodal
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

when calling the F4 help in control view (amodal), we cannot mark lines and rows in the resulting list (Ctrl Y, Ctrl C).

Netweaver SAP_BASIS    750    DIGITS
SAP GUI 8.00 64-bit patch level 8

 

Thank you for your help.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: ECATT for SU10 does not work in background processing
entry.content:
Dear all!

My ECATT for TCD SU10 runs in foreground without any troubles but by execution in a scheduled background job I get the error message "No batch input data for dynpro SAPMSSY0 0120".

Can someone tell me how I can solve?

Tx and regards,

Mario

entry.title: Note analyzer problem
entry.content:
Dear expert

I upload checked_system.xml via note analyzer, but something is wrong. It shows the message as below
Could you tell me what the root cause is ?

entry.title: SAP Data retrieval inconsistency
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I recently encountered a discrepancy in data I retrieved with two methods on SAP Netweaver:
1) SE16 transaction and 2) RFC_READ_TABLE function

The RFC_READ_TABLE missed some of the rows which SE16 showed. There were no filters used, no truncation, and the data requested was just the BELNR column of the BSEG table. The same client was used to authorize the retrieval. Anyone knows what could be a cause as to why some rows are not extracted via RFC_READ_TABLE?

Thank you!

Niko

entry.title: Not possible to retrieve information about SAP Scripting usage from directly from SAP.
entry.content:
We want to get the list of users who are using SAP Scripts since it is enabled for all user it is not possible to identify the population users who are using the sap scripts in EP7 SAP system, provide us the solution to find it. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: secussl_read: SSL_read() failed
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

We are facing problem that SAP instance can not connect to webdispatcher  due to certificate issue, 

Refer to below log:

[Thr 140520558421760] Sun Nov 24 15:17:32:142 2024 [Thr 140520558421760] Server SSL_CTX 7fcd784a7500 pvflags=897 (TLSv1.2,TLSv1.1,TLSv1.0,BC) [Thr 140520558421760] secussl_read: SSL_read() failed (536875078/0x20001046) [Thr 140520558421760] =

entry.title: Saprouter denies https after some time
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a pretty straightforward saprouter config file.
P * * *
and some lines
P <ip> website.domain 443

It works just fine, BUT after a few days the router starts denying https access.
I looked at all logs, nothing restarted the router or renewed its access table.

If I commit: saprouter -n
It is fine again and it is working fine for a few days.

I installed the latest version, but the problem persists.

What could be the reason?

Thanks!
I.G.

entry.title: Remove button in SU10 without using Screen Personas
entry.content:
Hi,
Our team wants to remove the button for editing single user in tcode SU01.
They say that the only way to achieve this is to install Screen Personas add-on.
However, we in the Basis team are wondering if another solution exist, to avoid having to install an new add-on just to remove 1 button in SU10.
See attachment to view the relevant button.
 
Do you know of another solution for this?
Thanks.
 



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
